aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期市场下跌后，作者多次强调基本面未变，认为波动来自流动性清算而非逻辑变化，并增持了相关标的。
representative_quotes: If your long term thesis hasn’t changed… Close your brokerage app. Go live your life. Be present with your family. Good night fam. 💚

In the end, we can’t tell you what stocks to buy, what timeframe you should sell, how to size your positions, or what you should do. Only share personal thoughts or research and track if they get validated over time.
I personally think current market conditions are a reflection of liquidity and leverage, not individual fundamentals.

representative_quotes: Tesla, $TSLA, is down nearly 14% today after earnings.
Hedge fund positioning in momentum is also stretched, and gross leverage remains near the top of its five-year range.

key_themes: 存储是AI基石，需求长期爆发

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从对存储整体乐观转为侧重云厂和端侧AI，同时因杠杆亏损和回调更加重视仓位管理与基本面匹配
representative_quotes: 云厂是不管谁领先，它的生意都越来越大需求越来越旺，它都能吃到调配算力的溢价。
存储的量决定了他们能训练多少数据，因为音频数据的大小规模千倍万倍于文本图片。
对于顶尖的模型来的算力和内存一直紧缺，差生只是文具多才出租算力。
